data.title: Zoomlion Showcases North America-Certified and Customized Equipment at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026
data.description: A leading company in the industry, Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. (1157.HK), recently presented its line of equipment and solutions tailored for the North American market at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026 in Las Vegas. The event featured products certified for the North American region and catered to market demands.

data.title: Costco Wholesale, Genesco And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Friday
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up this morning. Genesco Inc. (NYSE: GCO) is expected to announce earnings of $3.58 per share and revenue of $790.53 million. After hours trading saw Genesco shares rise by 1.8% to $26.55. Costco Wholesale Corp. (NASDAQ: COST) surpassed expectations in their second quarter results for fiscal 2026, reporting revenue of $69.60 billion compared to analyst predictions of $69.29 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: 38% of altcoins approach record lows, surpassing post-FTX crash: Analyst. Investor sentiment wanes as digital assets struggle to rebound from October 2025 crash.
data.description: Investor confidence continues to dwindle in the altcoin market, with digital asset prices still struggling to bounce back following the crash in October 2025. This downturn has led to a significant drop in the overall sentiment, impacting crucial indicators within the market. The uncertain climate has resulted in a bearish trend, with key altcoins facing immense pressure. As a result, the market is experiencing difficulties in regaining stability, with many investors closely monitoring the situation. The ongoing challenges have highlighted the volatility and risks associated with alternative cryptocurrencies, with numbers indicating a significant decline in trading volumes and overall market capitalization.

data.title: TeraWatt Technology Appoints Douglas Duncan as Director of International Business Development to Accelerate Global Expansion
data.description: On March 6, 2026, TeraWatt Technology Inc., based in California, USA, welcomed Mr. Douglas McW Duncan as their new Director of International Business Development. In his new role, he will supervise operations in the United States, Europe, and other regions.

data.title: Maxon and Tencent Cloud Partner to push 3D boundaries with Artist First Generative AI
data.description: At the recent Mobile World Congress (MWC) 2026 in Barcelona, Tencent Cloud, the cloud division of the global tech giant Tencent, unveiled a new collaboration with Maxon, a prominent provider of professional software for 3D design and motion graphics. This partnership marks a significant move in the industry, bringing together the expertise of Tencent Cloud with Maxon's innovative solutions for creative professionals. The announcement showcases Tencent Cloud's commitment to expanding its services and reach, while demonstrating Maxon's continued leadership in the field of design technology. The partnership is expected to drive growth and offer new opportunities for both companies in the fast-evolving digital landscape.

data.title: COMPUTEX Forum 2026 Opens for Registration
data.description: 30 influential figures in the tech industry are set to shape the direction of AI advancement at the upcoming COMPUTEX 2026 event in Taipei from June 2 to June 5. Super early bird discounts are currently being offered for a limited time, making this event a must-attend for those interested in the future of technology.

data.title: Sciwind Biosciences Announces Ecnoglutide Injection Approved by China's National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) for Chronic Weight Management
data.description: Hangzhou-based company Sciwind Biosciences Co., Ltd., specializing in biopharmaceuticals for metabolic diseases, revealed that China's National Medical Products Administration approved its latest therapies on March 6, 2026.

data.title: Ingram Micro Holding Corporation Announces Pricing of Secondary Offering of Common Stock by its Principal Stockholder.
data.description: In Irvine, California, Ingram Micro Holding Corporation disclosed the pricing for a secondary public offering of 8,988,764 shares of its common stock at $22.25 per share. This offering was made through a shelf registration statement with the SEC by Ingram Holdco, LLC, linked to Platinum Equity, LLC.
